We are asking for a fair playing field.

We want to protect the ability for anyone to create new startups, protecting fair free markets is what we have to fight for.  

If you live in CA, call your state reps and tell them you support the BASED Act

https://t.co/XboZOlzWth

The BASED Act bans three categories of conduct: promoting your own products ahead of competitors in search results, using non-public data from third-party sellers to build competing products, and conditioning marketplace access on purchasing other services. https://t.co/bi5vLIgcOM

Here is my counterpoint after 3 months of releasing open source used by tens of thousands of agentic engineers per day. 

Thin harness, fat skills: 

https://t.co/K2Sx8Cb4tz

If your memory dies when your harness dies, you built the harness too thick.

Memory is markdown. Skills are markdown. Brain is a git repo. The harness is a thin conductor — it reads the files, it doesn't own them. https://t.co/JPjnu2FhV6
